query:
UPDATE articles en_art
JOIN articles sv_art ON en_art.pairId = sv_art.pairId AND sv_art.language = 'sv'
SET en_art.imageUrl = sv_art.imageUrl
WHERE en_art.language = 'en'
AND (en_art.imageUrl IS NULL OR en_art.imageUrl = '')
AND sv_art.imageUrl IS NOT NULL AND sv_art.imageUrl != ''
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 42vUY4GWD37yPbX.84737946735b --database 3BmmrMXwxV4Z2AuoDAe93z --execute UPDATE articles en_art
JOIN articles sv_art ON en_art.pairId = sv_art.pairId AND sv_art.language = 'sv'
SET en_art.imageUrl = sv_art.imageUrl
WHERE en_art.language = 'en'
AND (en_art.imageUrl IS NULL OR en_art.imageUrl = '')
AND sv_art.imageUrl IS NOT NULL AND sv_art.imageUrl != ''
